narrative:
Liberty Twp 8 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,680 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
